channel.title: AKS Automatic on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in AKS Automatic on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: aks: Release 2026-05-29
item.description:
AKS release 2026-05-29 rolls out Kubernetes 1.36 preview and patch updates for 1.35.5/1.34.8/1.33.12, with multiple security and component updates. It also adds Windows Server 2025 and Azure Container Linux GA, expands AKS Automatic and LocalDNS behavior changes, and includes several retirement/deprecation notices for older Windows and Flatcar node images.

  • Source: Release notes from AKS

item.title: azure: [Launched] Generally available: Generally available: Managed system node pools in AKS Automatic
item.description:
AKS Automatic now provides managed system node pools, so Azure provisions and operates the system pool infrastructure instead of requiring customer management. This reduces ongoing work for scaling, patching, and availability.

  • Source: Azure Updates

item.title: azure: [In preview] Public Preview: Application Gateway for Containers managed add-on + AKS Automatic
item.description:
Azure AKS Automatic now supports the managed Application Gateway for Containers add-on in public preview. The update removes a previous limitation that prevented Application Gateway for Containers from being used with AKS Automatic.

  • Source: Azure Updates
